name: obsidian-cli
description: Bundle Obsidian CLI skills that teach the agent to operate Obsidian vaults through the official obsidian command-line tool.

interface.shortDescription: Use Obsidian vaults through the official CLI
interface.longDescription: A skill-only plugin that teaches the agent to use the official Obsidian CLI for vault inspection, note reading and writing, search, tasks, properties, and plugin development diagnostics. It does not bundle an MCP server and does not store Obsidian credentials.
defaultPrompt: Search my Obsidian vault for notes about a project
Append a task to today's Obsidian daily note
Use Obsidian CLI to reload the plugin I am developing

skillPreviews.name: obsidian-shared
skillPreviews.description: Set up, verify, troubleshoot, and target vaults for the official Obsidian CLI.

skillPreviews.name: obsidian-notes
skillPreviews.description: Read, create, open, append, prepend, move, rename, template, and manage Obsidian Markdown notes.

skillPreviews.name: obsidian-search
skillPreviews.description: Search and analyze Obsidian vault content, tags, links, backlinks, outlines, folders, and file lists.

skillPreviews.name: obsidian-tasks
skillPreviews.description: List, create, append, update, toggle, complete, and summarize Obsidian tasks and daily-note tasks.

skillPreviews.name: obsidian-dev
skillPreviews.description: Develop, reload, debug, inspect, screenshot, and diagnose Obsidian plugins and themes through CLI developer commands.
